title: Backup & restore
maintenance_active: Hyve is in maintenance mode while a restore is in progress. Try again shortly.
restore_restarting: Server is restarting to load restored data.
pre_restore_created: A safety backup was saved before restore.
confirm_restore: Restore this backup? Hyve will enter maintenance mode and a safety backup will be created first.
confirm_rollback: Roll back to this safety backup?
included_automations: Automations and scheduled jobs (YAML, jobs.sqlite, scheduler_meta)
no_archives: No backups yet. Create one to get started.
footer_hint: Restore automatically creates a safety backup. Use rollback on pre-restore archives if something goes wrong.
retention_hint: Maximum hyve-* backups. Older ones are deleted automatically.
last_scheduled_never: No scheduled backup has run yet.
encrypt_at_rest_hint: Save the key — you will need it to restore on another server.
encryption_key_confirm: This key decrypts all .enc backups from this server. Store it safely and copy it when migrating?
encryption_key_missing: Encryption key not created yet. Create a backup with “Encrypt archives” enabled.
encryption_key_pending: The key is created on the first encrypted backup. Download it right after.
encryption_key_modal_warning: Treat this key like a password. Without it, .enc archives cannot be restored on another server.
s3_env_hint: S3 credentials: HYVE_BACKUP_S3_ACCESS_KEY and HYVE_BACKUP_S3_SECRET_KEY in .env
remote_archives_hint: Save remote settings and press Refresh to list archives.
confirm_remote_restore: Download (if needed) and restore this remote backup? Hyve will enter maintenance mode and create a safety backup first.
remote_already_exists: This archive already exists locally. Delete it first or restore from the local list.
upload_hint: Import a .hyvebak from another Hyve server, then restore it.
upload_already_exists: This archive already exists. Delete it first or rename the file.
decrypt_failed: Could not decrypt backup archive. On another server, copy the key from the source instance or enter it at restore.
decrypt_key_prompt: This backup is encrypted. Enter the key from the server where it was created.
decrypt_key_hint: Usually the contents of secrets/backup_archive.key or HYVE_BACKUP_ENCRYPTION_KEY from .env.
decrypt_key_placeholder: Fernet key (optional if already on this server)
encryption_unavailable: Encryption is not available on this server.
